description: Lead has an existing tenant with a current tenancy agreement. Cannot list on STR until tenant exits. Timeline depends on notice period and tenant cooperation.
typical_timeline: 1-6 months depending on tenancy agreement and notice period
key_questions_to_ask: When does the current tenancy end?
Is it a fixed term or rolling monthly?
Has the tenant been given notice?
Is there any reason the tenant might not leave on time?
what_to_do: Set a provisional start date based on tenancy end
Schedule a follow-up call 4 weeks before that date
Send action plan and management agreement now so they are ready to sign when tenant leaves
what_not_to_do: pressure lead to evict tenant early
assume tenancy will end on time
lose contact during the wait period
risk_factors: tenant refuses to leave — legal process can extend to 6+ months
lead loses interest during the wait
lead keeps renewing tenancy with current tenant
follow_up_cadence: Monthly until 6 weeks before tenancy end, then weekly

notable_leads.name: Avik Pal
notable_leads.note: Classic DLY-TEN. Loss-averse-switcher archetype. Will need income comparison data when ready.

notable_leads.name: Linda
notable_leads.note: Status-quo-resistant. May renew tenancy. Monitor closely.

notable_leads.name: Abby Thomas
notable_leads.note: Active follow-up. Second meeting happened. Ready to sign when tenant exits.
